Interface DRICrosstabGroup<T>

All Superinterfaces:
DRIExpression<T>, DRISystemExpression<T>, Serializable
All Known Subinterfaces:
DRICrosstabColumnGroup<T>, DRICrosstabRowGroup<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
DRCrosstabColumnGroup, DRCrosstabGroup, DRCrosstabRowGroup
public interface DRICrosstabGroup<T> extends DRISystemExpression<T>

DRICrosstabGroup interface.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca, Jan Moxter
